metadata.title: Nano Banana Studio: Generador de Imágenes IA Gratis (Sin Registro)
metadata.description: Convierte texto en imágenes impresionantes en segundos. Con Google Gemini — 5 generaciones gratis, 10+ estilos artísticos, edición imagen a imagen. La alternativa gratuita a Midjourney y DALL-E.
metadata.keywords: generador de imágenes IA gratis, mejor IA arte 2026, texto a imagen IA, alternativa Midjourney gratis, alternativa DALL-E, editor de fotos IA online, crear imágenes con IA, Gemini generador

hero.title: Create AI Images With Text That Actually Renders Correctly
hero.description: Most AI image generators struggle with typography. Nano Banana Studio focuses on generating images with clear, readable text — perfect for posters, logos, social media visuals, and product graphics. Powered by advanced Gemini models.
hero.tip: 5 free generations to start • No credit card required

problem.title: Why AI Image Generators Struggle With Text
problem.description: Generating readable text inside images is surprisingly difficult. Most diffusion models treat letters like random shapes, which often leads to:

items.title: Broken characters
items.description: Letters get swapped, mirrored, or replaced with similar-looking but incorrect characters.

items.title: Unreadable typography
items.description: Text renders as blurry, garbled shapes instead of clean, legible letters.

items.title: Inconsistent spacing
items.description: Characters crowd together, overlap, or spread apart unpredictably.

items.title: Misspelled words
items.description: The same prompt produces different spelling errors every time you generate.

problem.tip: Nano Banana Studio se enfoca en resolver este problema. Por qué los generadores de imágenes con IA fallan al renderizar texto →

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Nano Banana Studio.

items.question: What is Nano Banana Studio?
items.answer: Nano Banana Studio is an AI image generator designed for creators who need images with readable text and clean visual composition.

items.question: What AI model powers the generator?
items.answer: The system uses advanced Gemini-based models optimized for natural language image generation and text rendering accuracy.

items.question: Do I need prompt engineering skills?
items.answer: No. The system is designed to work with natural language descriptions. Just describe what you want in plain English.

items.question: How accurate is the text rendering?
items.answer: For short text (1-5 words like names, titles, and signs), accuracy is very high. Longer text blocks may occasionally require regeneration.

items.question: What languages are supported for text in images?
items.answer: The Gemini models support text rendering in English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and many other languages.

items.question: How does the free tier work?
items.answer: New users get 5 free image generations. No credit card required. After that, affordable plans start at $9.90/month.

items.question: Can I use generated images commercially?
items.answer: Yes. Images can be used in marketing materials, social media, and creative projects.

cta.title: Ready to Create Images With Real Text?
cta.description: Start generating AI images instantly. No credit card required.
